description: A hospital research board has approved sharing a heart disease clinical dataset, provided that direct identifiers are removed and age is generalized. De-identify the dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\hospital_admissions_sensitive.csv' using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Create a new variable 'AgeDecade' that generalizes the 'age' variable into 10-year bins (e.g., 29->20, 34->30, 48->40). Export the resulting dataset to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\public_heart_data.csv'. The exported file must include the new 'AgeDecade' variable and all original clinical variables (sex, cp, trestbps, chol, etc.), but must exclude the 'MRN', 'PatientName', and the original exact 'age' columns.
